title: Rathbunia pruinosa
intro: Rathbunia pruinosa, also known as the hairy rathbunia or hairy ballhead, is a rare annual plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties, which can help in treating conditions such as fever, pain, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Rathbunia pruinosa include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Rathbunia pruinosa is commonly prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
